fields.name: Barbell Bench Press
fields.description: A classic compound movement using free weights to build strength and mass in the chest, shoulders, and triceps.

fields.name: Barbell Back Squat
fields.description: The king of lower-body exercises. Targets the quadriceps, hamstrings, glutes, and lower back.

fields.name: Pull-Ups
fields.description: An essential calisthenics exercise performed with bodyweight to build a strong back and biceps.

fields.name: Push-Ups
fields.description: A fundamental bodyweight movement that builds upper body endurance and core stability.

fields.name: Seated Cable Row
fields.description: A controlled movement performed on a machine to target the upper back and lats while minimizing lower back stress.

fields.name: Kettlebell Swing
fields.description: A powerful functional and CrossFit exercise that conditions the entire posterior chain and improves explosive power.
